rulings.Case Title: IRON MAN MOVING, INC ET AL VS. JAMES J KENNEDY III ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 01, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT JAMES KENNEDY III, PATRICK KENNEDY, KENENDY VAN & STORAGE, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the cause of action for wrongful eviction. Motion is otherwise denied. Facts supporting malice are sufficiently alleged. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HAPPY 42ND AVE PARTNERS LLC VS. JODY TELLIER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 01, 2021 line 6. DEFENDANT ARTHUR JACINTO HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION Hearing Required. Claimant to bring all evidence supporting his claim that he was in possession as of December 19, 2019 per a rental agreement with the former owner of the property including but not limited to copies of the rental agreement, rent payment receipts, cancelled checks, utility bills, school enrollment, paychecks or government assistance checks reflecting the address at the premises prior to December 19 2019, etc. All evidence to be provided to the courtroom clerks no later than 9:00 a.m. on September 1, 2021 and filed in room 103 by 9:30 a.m. on September, 2021. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. RICARDO ANGUIANO CRUZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 01, 2021 line 10. DEFENDANT RICARDO CRUZ DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint and Notice to Quit state the nature of the nuisance upon which the termination of tenancy is based. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that an opportunity to cure must be provided under the circumstances, alleged illegal activity nuisance. Complaint is not uncertain and provides necessary information for Defendant to respond, admit or deny stealing somebody else's package. =(501/CFH)
